title: As Suwayq Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting As Suwayq with a Z-Score of +7.03. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in As Suwayq has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 23.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 25%, and the wind speed is approximately 14.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city is experiencing no Heating Degree Days (HDD), indicating a complete absence of cooler temperatures, with all energy focused on cooling.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
